name: Slayr
description: '''Evan McDonald''' (born May 22, 2007), known professionally as '''Slayr''' (stylized in [[lowercase]]), is an American rapper, singer, and record producer from [[Philadelphia]]. He's widely known for the release of his seventh mixtape, ''[[Half Blood (mixtape)|Half Blood]]'', in 2025 and a deluxe reissue titled ''Half Blood (Bloodluxe)'' in 2026.
